message:
Fix npm publish workflow

Use Node 24 and plain npm publish to match the trusted\npublishing setup that succeeds in the other pi package repos. This\nreplaces the older npm 10 publish path used previously.

files.patch:
@@ -21,8 +21,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: "20"
+          node-version: "24"
           registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
 
       - name: Publish package
-        run: npm publish --provenance --access public
+        run: npm publish
